productName: HiKu - DOH DIST - Sugar-Free Coffee Vanilla Latte - 100mgTHC HiKu 1oz Tincture - Sugar-Free Coffee - 30g
description: A crisp smooth, creamy vanilla drink that tastes like it was mixed at a tiny craft soda bar — flavorful, refreshing, and infused for a smooth edible-style ride. A refreshing hybrid option for customers who prefer their cannabis in a drinkable format.
